snapshot.scope: Independent Planning review binds the mechanically integrated Settings Index and Maintenance production surface to the existing Local Database typed owners on sole origin/main b17c659, without changing service, IPC, contract or governance semantics.

reviewers.task: Settings Index and Maintenance mechanical integration review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the UI delta and independently compared the Settings Index and Maintenance surface with the existing Local Database status, check, rebuild and reset-preview owners, focused tests and exact UI Design handoff.

dimensions.summary: The existing Settings and Local Database owners carry the visible Index and Maintenance workflow without a duplicate owner document or a new service boundary.
The renderer uses only existing typed status, check, rebuild and reset-preview/apply owners; raw maintenance and filesystem failures remain body-free and localized.
Exact focused, type, build and visual gates cover the production surface without changing Requirement, Exit or Phase status or claiming that destructive reset was executed.
Focused regressions cover body-free failures, real status/check/rebuild binding, preview-first reset, Escape/cancel focus restoration and compact Settings navigation.
The mechanical UI integration needs only this refreshed independent-review binding; no product, architecture, decision or trace owner requires a semantic edit.

verification.command: Independent implementation and owner-contract review of Settings Index and Maintenance on origin/main b17c659
verification.evidence: Review covers the exact nine UI-owned paths, existing Local Database projections, body-free failures and reset-preview ownership; no main, preload, service, contract or governance byte changed.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, PRD structure and decision records remain unchanged and pass for the mechanical UI integration.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 remain green and the recipe binds governed roots plus the changed Settings UI and tests without Requirement, Exit or Phase promotion.

coordination.taskTitle: Settings Index and Maintenance mechanical integration
coordination.compatibility: The candidate exposes existing Local Database maintenance owners through the approved Settings hierarchy; service behavior, IPC contracts, persistence and release scope remain unchanged.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning reviewed the exact mechanical UI delta and its evidence; reset remained preview-only during real macOS validation and this review does not claim new maintenance capability.

nonBlockingRisks: The real macOS reset flow was not executed; preview, cancel and focus restoration are verified while destructive application remains covered by existing typed tests.
Windows visual evidence remains deferred; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
